photos.alt: The model spins on a sun-bleached rooftop deck in a white silk blouse printed with red, blue and black brushstrokes, over a red patchwork midi skirt and red sock boots.
Close portrait in flat white daylight, the model lifting an arm in a white silk blouse printed with red and blue brushstrokes, its pussy-bow collar falling loose at the throat.
The model turns to camera in an oversized slate-blue shaggy faux fur coat with wide notched lapels, a black and white printed scarf knotted beneath, against a hazed-out sky.
The model walks a rooftop ramp lined with traffic cones in a turquoise tiered organza dress with high ruffled neck and blouson sleeves, white sunglasses, skyline hazed behind.
Seated on pale rooftop paving in hard midday sun, she wears the turquoise pleated organza gown, its scalloped tiers and sheer sleeves pooling across the concrete.
The model rests her head on one hand in a sheer turquoise ruffled high-neck dress with cut-out shoulder, on a sun-bleached rooftop deck.
The model leans against a white parapet in a red wool trouser suit and black loafers, flat daylight washing the rooftop road behind her.
The model stands hand on hip in an oversized red blazer over a draped red blouse, hazy skyline and traffic cones behind.
The model bends forward with hands on her knees in a double-breasted red suit, framed against a blown-out white rooftop wall.
Close crop of the model in white oval sunglasses and a red silk headscarf worn over a matching red wool coat in bright haze.
The model leans on a low white parapet in a high-necked dress printed with red, purple and blue brushstrokes, hazy skyline behind.
Turning back over her shoulder on pale rooftop tiling, she wears a long-sleeved high-neck dress in red, purple and blue abstract print.
Close waist-up frame of the model in a double-breasted boucle tweed coat with pink checks and oversized buttons, wearing rose-tinted sunglasses in warm low sun.
Full-length on the rooftop at golden hour: pink-checked tweed coat over a dark plum skirt, snakeskin platform boots, towers rising behind.
Seated on a small red bench, she wears a heavy striped knit coat over a plum skirt with tall snakeskin platform boots, grainy warm light.
The model stands on a white rooftop deck in a cobalt satin gown with high neck, gathered sleeves and wrapped waist, skyline pink behind her.
Grainy frame with the film rebate showing, the model reclining against a rooftop parapet in the blue satin gown above a hazy grey city at dusk.
Grainy close frame of the model leaning on a rooftop ledge in the blue satin gown, a fine pendant chain at her neck, city lights blurred gold behind.
